series_metadata.series_description: Copies of final negotiated contracts between each bargaining unit and the state. In addition to the final printed contract, file also includes any submission to the Controlling Board/Legislature (fiscal summary, summary of changes, and overview of the contract), and any side letters or letters of intent. Files may be in electronic form or paper.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office area permanent retention. ; Paper: in office area permanent retention
